news.headline: Dow Jones futures influenced by Boeing, Biden, French elections. Tesla and Amazon in buy zones.
news.summary: Market volatility may be influenced by President Biden's political future and the upcoming French elections. Stocks of Tesla and Amazon are performing well and are currently in buy zones. Dow Jones Futures are focusing on Boeing, Biden, and France, with Tesla and Amazon showing strong numbers in the market.

news.headline: Unicycive Therapeutics joins Russell Microcap® Index on July 1, 2024, helping kidney disease patients.
news.summary: Unicycive Therapeutics, Inc., headquartered in Los Altos, California, revealed that it has been added to the Russell Microcap Index as part of the 2024 Russell US Indexes annual reconstitution. The inclusion is set to take effect on July 1, 2024, coinciding with the open of US equity markets. Unicycive, trading on Nasdaq under the symbol UNCY, is a clinical-stage biotechnology company dedicated to developing treatments for individuals suffering from kidney disease. This move signifies a significant milestone for the company, solidifying its position within the market and potentially increasing visibility among investors.

news.headline: Yunity invests $1B in AI & deep tech startups to revolutionize industry, partnering with SingularityNET for funding.
news.summary: In Seattle, Yunity unveiled IMAGINE, a platform aiding impact-driven startups in enhancing their businesses, at the Artificial SuperIntelligence (ASI) Alliance Summit. ASI, a key player in global AI research, is known for its open-source approach. By partnering with ASI Co-Founder SingularityNET, IMAGINE plans to inject $1 billion in startups focused on beneficial AI and deep technology. This initiative is poised to revolutionize the startup scene, offering essential resources for growth and innovation.

news.headline: Xevant and Ivím Health partner to launch Ivím at Work, a corporate GLP-1 weight loss program, setting a new standard.
news.summary: Xevant, a prominent healthcare data analytics provider, and Ivím Health, a top-tier GLP-1 weight loss program provider, have formed a strategic alliance to launch Ivím at Work with Xevant. This pioneering corporate-designed medical weight loss solution marks a significant development in the industry. The program not only introduces medical weight loss as a corporate benefit but also establishes a gold standard for superior clinical care. This collaboration underscores a commitment to innovative healthcare solutions.

news.headline: Gotcha Covered opens new location in San Antonio with Ruby Lopez; specializes in custom window treatments in U.S. and Canada.
news.summary: Ruby Lopez has recently become a part of the prominent window treatment franchise, Gotcha Covered. The company is known for its expertise in custom window treatment consultation across the U.S. and Canada. They have just unveiled a new branch in Texas named Gotcha Covered of Far West San Antonio. The expansion aims to cater to the growing demand for their services in the region. This move signifies the commitment of Gotcha Covered to serve a wider clientele and establish a strong presence in the market. The addition of Ruby Lopez to the team is expected to further propel the success of this venture.

news.headline: Centuri Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CTRI) joins Russell 2000® Index on July 1, 2024. Annual reconstitution captures top 4,000 US stocks by total market cap.
news.summary: Centuri Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: CTRI), a prominent North American utility infrastructure services company, revealed today that it has been included in the Russell 2000® Index as part of the annual reconstitution of the Russell stock indexes. This move was effective on July 1, 2024, marking a significant milestone for Centuri. The Russell US Indexes reconstitution ranks the 4,000 largest US stocks as of Tuesday, April 30 by total market capitalization, solidifying Centuri's position in the market.

news.headline: Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX) to hold earnings conference call on August 2, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. ET with dial-in 888-271-8608.
news.summary: Chevron Corporation (NYSE: CVX), a global energy leader, is set to host its quarterly earnings conference call on Friday, August 2, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time (8:00 a.m. Pacific Time). For those interested, the call can be accessed at 888-271-8608 with the Conference ID # 3154534. The speakers for the call will include Mike Wirth, the Chairman of the Board and Chief Executive Officer, and Eimear Bonner, the Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. This call is a key opportunity to gain insights into the company's financial performance and strategic outlook.

news.headline: Perun introduces DS-100W Foldable Solar Panel in Canada for portable power, reaching 23% charging conversion rate.
news.summary: Perun, a prominent provider of portable power solutions, has launched the Perun DS-100W Foldable Solar Panel in Canada. This innovative product caters to individuals seeking a quick and effective power solution while on the move. Ideal for outdoor enthusiasts and professionals, the solar panel boasts cutting-edge technology that enables high charging conversion rates of up to 23%. The Perun DS-100W Solar Panel Kit harnesses the sun's energy to deliver a reliable power source for various needs.

news.headline: Performance Food Group Company (PFGC) appoints Danielle Brown to Board of Directors, expanding it to 12 members. Brown is 53 years old.
news.summary: In Richmond, Virginia, Performance Food Group Company (PFG) (NYSE: PFGC) has appointed Danielle M. Brown as an independent director on its Board of Directors, starting June 28, 2024. This decision has increased PFG's Board membership to 12. Ms. Brown, aged 53, holds the position of Senior Vice President and Chief Information Officer. She has been selected to join the Company's Audit and Finance Committee as well as the Technology and Cybersecurity Committee.

news.headline: Scott's Liquid Gold-Inc. postpones Transactions with Horizon Kinetics LLC, includes 1-for-20 reverse stock split.
news.summary: Denver-based company Scott's Liquid Gold-Inc. (OTC: SLGD) issued an update on its transaction with Horizon Kinetics LLC, including a 1-for-20 reverse stock split, reincorporation, name change, and ticker symbol change. The closing of the transactions has been delayed to facilitate a seamless transition in trading. This move comes as part of the company's efforts to enhance its market position.

news.headline: Avid Bioservices will report financial results for quarter and fiscal year ended April 30, 2024, on July 2, 2024, after market close. Webcast at 1:30 PM Pacific Time. Senior management to discuss results.
news.summary: Avid Bioservices, Inc. (NASDAQ: CDMO) headquartered in Tustin, California, disclosed plans to release financial outcomes for the quarter and fiscal year concluding on April 30, 2024. The announcement is scheduled for July 2, 2024, post-market closure, with a webcast set to transpire at 1:30 PM Pacific Time (4:30 PM Eastern Time) on the same day. During the webcast, key executives from Avid will delve into the financial results for the aforementioned period and shed light on recent corporate advancements. Stay tuned for further updates on this developing story.

news.headline: Invivyd added to Russell 2000® and Russell 3000® Indexes as part of annual reconstitution, effective today. Nasdaq: IVVD.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Invivyd, Inc. (Nasdaq: IVVD), headquartered in Waltham, Massachusetts, shared its inclusion in the Russell indexes. The biopharmaceutical company, specializing in protection against severe viral infections, stated that it would now be part of the Russell 2000® Index and Russell 3000® Index. This change took effect at the commencement of U.S. equity trading on the same day.

news.headline: Nidec invests $20M in Eve Air Mobility for eVTOL partnership via NMC subsidiary, linking with Eve as a manufacturer.
news.summary: Japanese company Nidec has revealed plans to invest $20 million in the manufacturer of eVTOL aircraft, Eve Air Mobility. This minority equity investment will be made on July 2, 2024, through Nidec's subsidiary, Nidec Motor Corporation. Eve Air Mobility is known as Eve Holding, Inc., listed on the New York Stock Exchange, with headquarters in Melbourne. Nidec Aerospace will be partnering with Eve as the launch partner for their propulsion system.

news.headline: Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG) to release Q2 earnings on July 31, 2024. Conference call at 7:00 am Central Time. Website for webcast.
news.summary: Bunge Global SA (NYSE: BG) is scheduled to release its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2024, on Wednesday, July 31, 2024, before market opening. The company's management will conduct a conference call at 7:00 a.m. Central Time to review the results. A presentation will be available on www.bunge.com during the call. For the webcast, visit the “Investor Center” section of the company's website, under “News & Events” and then “Events & Presentations”.

news.headline: Mann Lake Ltd. acquires Pierce Beekeeping Equipment, expanding product offerings with quality supplies in Hackensack, Minn.
news.summary: HACKENSACK, Minn. - Mann Lake Ltd. has recently completed the acquisition of Pierce Beekeeping Equipment. This move is aimed at broadening their range of beekeeping supplies. The acquisition will enable Mann Lake Ltd. to offer a wider variety of high-quality products to their customers. The specific financial details of the acquisition have not been disclosed to the public.

news.headline: Yili wins four World Dairy Innovation Awards at 17th Global Dairy Congress in London, focusing on health and sustainability.
news.summary: The 17th edition of the Global Dairy Congress was held in London, UK, from June 25 to 27, 2024. With the theme "Healthy People, Healthy Planet," the event brought together prominent figures from the dairy sector, including company executives, researchers, specialists, and representatives from industry associations.

news.headline: Reverence Capital to acquire majority stake in Sunstar Insurance Group, LLC. Announcement made on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Reverence Capital Partners, a private equity firm specializing in financial services investments, revealed their plans to secure a majority ownership in Sunstar Insurance Group, LLC. This acquisition marks a significant move in the financial sector, with Reverence Capital taking a prominent position in Sunstar.

news.headline: Altair acquires Metrics Design Automation Inc, enhancing its presence in EDA industry with flagship product DSim. Deal announced on July 1, 2024. Nasdaq: ALTR.
news.summary: A groundbreaking product named DSim, an EDA simulation offered as a service, has been introduced. Altair, a leading computational intelligence company, recently disclosed that it will acquire all outstanding assets. The agreement, finalized on July 1, 2024, comes as Altair's stock (Nasdaq: ALTR) continues its prominent position in the global market. This acquisition represents a significant milestone for the company and is anticipated to have a profound impact on its future operations.

news.headline: Mobilicom receives new order for its drone data link system from large US-based manufacturer, amid $18 billion drone market forecast by 2030.
news.summary: Mobilicom Limited (Nasdaq: MOB), based in Shoham, Israel, revealed today that they have secured a repeat order from a prominent U.S. drone producer specializing in "small-sized" drones. With a yearly revenue exceeding $5 billion, this defense manufacturer has chosen to integrate Mobilicom’s SkyHopper PRO into its drones. The drones, intended for sale to customers in the U.S. defense sector, including the U.S. Department of Defense, will benefit from Mobilicom’s cybersecurity and reliable solutions.

news.headline: BCE advises shareholders to reject TRC Capital's below-market mini-tender offer for 2.5M shares.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, BCE Inc. (TSX: BCE) (NYSE: BCE) announced it received notification from TRC Capital Investment Corporation about an unsolicited mini-tender offer. TRC Capital intends to buy up to 2,500,000 BCE common shares, representing around 0.3% of the total outstanding shares of the company.

news.headline: Beamr Imaging Ltd. revealed AI integrated into Beamr Cloud for auto caption in multiple languages, with plans for more features.
news.summary: In Herzliya, Israel, on July 01, 2024, Beamr Imaging Ltd. revealed that it will be introducing its initial AI feature within Beamr Cloud, the firm’s GPU-driven video platform. This AI upgrade will facilitate automatic caption and transcription generation for videos in various languages. As part of integrating AI functionalities into Beamr Cloud, this enhancement marks the company's starting point. In upcoming months, Beamr aims to unveil more video AI features. Beamr Imaging Ltd. operates under the ticker symbol BMR on the NASDAQ stock exchange.

news.headline: Aircastle secures $300 million equity from Marubeni Corporation and Mizuho Leasing out of $500 million commitment.
news.summary: In a press release dated July 1, 2024, Aircastle Limited disclosed that it had secured $300 million in equity funding from its shareholders, Marubeni Corporation and Mizuho Leasing. This amount represents the second part of a $500 million equity commitment, with the initial tranche undisclosed.

news.headline: JPA Health appoints Colleen Carter as Head of Life Sciences and Adam Pawluk as Head of JPA Labs in Washington.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, JPA Health, a full-service agency specializing in the health sector, disclosed the addition of two key members to its leadership team. Colleen Carter will serve as the Head of Life Sciences, while Adam Pawluk will take on the role of Head of JPA. This move underscores the agency's commitment to growth and strategic development.

news.headline: Patient with decompensated liver cirrhosis showed improvement after treatment with Namodenoson.
news.summary: In response to a recent event, it has been reported that the number of confirmed cases has risen to over 10,000. There have also been 235 reported deaths as a result of the situation. Authorities are actively working to contain the spread of the virus by implementing strict measures and guidelines. Additionally, medical professionals are urging the public to practice good hygiene and follow recommended safety protocols to prevent further transmission. The situation is being closely monitored, and updates will be provided as more information becomes available.

news.headline: Labcorp will reveal Q2 2024 financial results on August 1, 2024; press release before market opens.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Labcorp, a leading provider of laboratory services worldwide, announced that it will disclose its financial outcomes for Q2 of 2024 prior to the market opening on August 1, 2024. The organization, listed on NYSE as LH, is set to hold a conference to discuss these results.

news.headline: ZCITY partners with Ezytronic for AI GPU rental services, enhancing technological offerings. Strategic move to meet high demand.
news.summary: Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, July 01, 2024 - ZCITY Sdn Bhd, a subsidiary of Treasure Global Inc (NASDAQ: TGL), has entered a strategic partnership with Ezytronic Sdn Bhd to create and back Artificial Intelligence (AI) Graphics Processing Unit (GPU) rental services. This move marks a major advancement in ZCITY's goal to improve its technology services and address the rising need for high-performance computing resources.

news.headline: Captiv8 partners with TikTok to launch TikTok Shop integration, enhancing social commerce. #1 influencer marketing platform for enterprise brands.
news.summary: Captiv8 has recently broadened its collaboration with TikTok and introduced a TikTok Shop integration. The announcement was made on July 1, 2024, in San Francisco. Captiv8 is recognized as the top influencer marketing platform catering to enterprise brands. This new integration is part of their ongoing partnership with TikTok, aimed at enhancing the shopping experience for users.

news.headline: 5E Advanced Materials sends first boric acid samples to customers. Progressing towards Phase 1 commercial operation.
news.summary: Negotiations with potential customers have progressed as the company ships products for testing. This development comes as the company moves closer to the start of Phase 1 commercial operations.

news.headline: Get ready for July 4th with Beef. It's What's For Dinner. brand offering three grilling recipes.
news.summary: Three grilling recipes guaranteed to ignite your Fourth of July party in DENVER on July 1, 2024. Get ready to celebrate with delicious dishes from the Beef. It's What's For Dinner. brand, sponsored by the Beef Checkoff program. Don't miss out on these flavorful recipes to spice up your holiday with red, white, and blue-themed festivities. So, gather your loved ones, prepare to fire up the grill, and enjoy a feast like never before.

news.headline: Bitfarms earned 189 BTC in June 2024, increased installed hashrate to 11.4 EH/s, and plans to reach 21 EH/s in 2024. Strategic U.S. expansion to a 120 MW site. 2025 power capacity target doubles to 648 MW.
news.summary: In June 2024, a total of 189 Bitcoins were earned, while the installed hashrate was increased to 11.4 EH/s, with 10.4 EH/s being operational. There was an improvement in energy efficiency to 25 watts per terahash (w/TH), marking a 36% year-over-year increase and a 7.4% month-over-month increase. A strategic expansion in the U.S. included a 120-megawatt site tailored for high-performance computing/artificial intelligence. The power capacity target for 2025 has more than doubled to 648 MW from the current 310 MW. The company is progressing towards reaching 21 EH/s and 21 w/TH in 2024 and has set a goal of achieving 35+ EH/s as per their 2025 guidance.

news.headline: Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR) to release Q2 2024 financial results after market close. Leader in data center solutions.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on July 1, 2024, Digital Realty, a leading global company specializing in cloud and carrier-neutral data center services, revealed plans to report its financial performance for the second quarter of 2024 following market closure. As the most extensive provider in the industry, Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR) offers a range of colocation and interconnection solutions worldwide. Stay tuned for the upcoming release of key financial figures and company updates.

news.headline: Nicole Bello named Group Vice President of EMEA at Dayforce.
Axogen, Inc. makes inducement grant to new employee on July 1, 2024, under NASDAQ listing rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: In Alachua, Florida, and Tampa, Florida, on July 1, 2024, Axogen, Inc. (NASDAQ: AXGN), a prominent company specializing in pioneering surgical remedies for peripheral nerve injuries, disclosed an inducement grant under NASDAQ listing rule 5635(c)(4). This grant was made in relation to the recruitment of a new non-executive staff member.

news.headline: Immersive Wisdom showcased ultra-low bandwidth capability at 5-50 kbps per user during a DoD exercise on SIPRNet.
news.summary: Immersion Wisdom, Inc., a leading provider of resilient live communications software for operations in challenging environments, has successfully delivered critical software that ensures continuous connectivity at speeds ranging from 5 to 50 kilobits per second per user. These speeds are reminiscent of the bandwidth capabilities of modems commonly used in the 1990s. The company's software has demonstrated its effectiveness in contested environments, maintaining a TRL-9 distributed network system. This development comes as a significant advancement in ensuring reliable communication for users in demanding scenarios.

news.headline: Canoo Inc. (Nasdaq: GOEV) joins Russell 3000®, Russell 2000®, and Russell Microcap® Indexes on July 01, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Justin, Texas, Canoo Inc. (Nasdaq: GOEV), a leading high-tech mobility firm, revealed its inclusion in the Russell 3000® Index, Russell 2000® Index, and Russell Microcap® Index following the 2024 Russell US Indexes annual reconstitution. This adjustment took effect at the start of the US equity markets today, marking a significant milestone for the company.

news.headline: Nearmap reveals new brand identity and expanded offerings, citing commitment to innovation and customer success.
news.summary: Today, Nearmap, a leading provider of location intelligence and aerial imagery solutions, introduced a new brand direction in Salt Lake City on July 1, 2024. The overhaul includes an enhanced visual identity and an expanded range of services, showcasing their dedication to innovation and customer satisfaction. This rebranding effort signifies the company's continuous evolution in the industry and commitment to meeting the growing demands of their clients.

news.headline: Avanos Medical, Inc. appoints Indrani Franchini to board of directors as new independent member.
news.summary: In Alpharetta, Georgia, on July 1, 2024, Avanos Medical, Inc. (NYSE: AVNS) revealed the appointment of Indrani Franchini as a new independent member of their board of directors. This announcement signifies a significant move for the company, showcasing their commitment to diversifying their board. Gary, a spokesperson for Avanos, expressed enthusiasm about Franchini joining the team, underscoring the importance of her expertise and perspective. This move is part of Avanos' strategic approach to governance and leadership, seeking to enhance the overall effectiveness of their board.

news.headline: Green Thumb Industries (GTII) to release 2nd quarter 2024 financial results on August 5, 2024, after market closes.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Green Thumb Industries Inc. (GTII) revealed it would disclose its financial standings for the second quarter of 2024 after markets close on Monday, August 5, 2024. The company, known for its ownership of RISE Dispensaries and prominent position in the cannabis consumer packaged goods industry, operates within both Chicago and Vancouver, British Columbia. Green Thumb is publicly traded under the symbols CSE: GTII and OTCQX: GTBIF. The disclosed information provides insights into the company's performance and market position.

news.headline: SKB & Landrock acquire Walnut Business Center in Boulder, CO for modernization & community enhancement.
news.summary: In Boulder, Colorado, on July 1, 2024, ScanlanKemperBard (SKB) and Landrock revealed their joint ownership of the Walnut Business Center. This complex serves as a prominent urban hub for industrial and retail activities in Boulder. The acquisition marks a crucial strategic move for both companies.

news.headline: Complete Solaria is now debt-free after eliminating $67.6 million in private equity debt.
news.summary: Full Solaria has publicly declared its freedom from private equity responsibilities and has successfully removed $67.6 million in long-term debt from its financial records.

news.headline: Motomova acquires SkillR to enhance their product suite. The industrial tech firm offers testing solutions for electric motors.
news.summary: A popular industrial technology company, Motomova, Inc. (OTC: MTMV), which is supported by venture capital, has revealed its plan to widen its range of products. The company is well-known for producing and distributing testing solutions designed for electric motors. This move was announced on July 1, 2024, in New York.

news.headline: SU Group Holdings sees 11.7% rise in security segment revenue, 200% YoY increase in cash reserves.
news.summary: In the latest financial report, SU Group Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: SUGP) revealed a significant 11.7% year-over-year rise in revenues from security guarding and screening services segment. The company also saw an impressive surge in cash and cash equivalents, soaring by almost 200% compared to the previous year. SU Group, a key player in the security-related engineering industry, shared these promising figures on July 1, 2024, showcasing strong growth and financial stability.

news.headline: Sandy Spring Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: SASR) will announce Q2 earnings on July 23, 2024 at 2:00 p.m. (ET) with webcast available. Attendees can call 1-833-470-1428 with Access Code: 340278 for questions. Replay available on website until August 6, 2024 and by phone at 1-866-813-9403 with conference number: 846010.
news.summary: Olney, Maryland - Sandy Spring Bancorp, Inc. (SASR) is set to report its second-quarter earnings on July 23, 2024. A conference call will take place at 2:00 p.m. (ET) on that day to review the financial results and respond to inquiries. The call will be streamed live on the Sandy Spring Bank website. For those interested in asking questions during the call, dial 1-833-470-1428 and enter the Access Code: 340278. To listen to the call, visit the Investor Relations section of www.sandyspringbank.com and log in 10 minutes before the scheduled start. An online replay will be accessible on the Investor Relations page until August 6, 2024. Alternatively, a voice replay can be accessed by calling 1-866-813-9403 with the conference number: 846010 within the same timeframe.

news.headline: Dunes Point Capital acquires Stratus Construction & Roofing, LLC through Roofing Services Solutions, a key acquisition in FL.Characters: 109
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Roofing Services Solutions (RSS), owned by Dunes Point Capital, LP (DPC), completed the acquisition of Stratus Construction & Roofing, LLC in Maitland, FL. Stratus specializes in re-reroofing and building exterior services. This acquisition strengthens RSS's presence in the industry as it continues to expand its portfolio under DPC.

news.headline: RYVYL shifts focus to licensing, appoints Christian Murray as Managing Director for Northeast Merchant Systems.
news.summary: Christian Murray, a seasoned expert in the fintech industry, has been appointed to spearhead RYVYL's licensing strategy. In a significant move, he has transitioned from his previous role as the Vice President of Revenue to the newly established position of Managing Director for Northeast Merchant Systems. This change signifies RYVYL's commitment to enhancing its licensing operations under Murray's guidance.

news.headline: Bridger Aerospace Group Holdings, a leading aerial firefighting company, announces CEO resignation and new interim CEO.
news.summary: In Belgrade, Montana on July 01, 2024, Bridger Aerospace Group Holdings, Inc., a prominent aerial firefighting company traded on NASDAQ under BAER and BAERW, disclosed modifications to its leadership team and Board of Directors. Timothy P. Sheehy, the Chief Executive Officer and Director, has tendered his resignation as he pursues a U.S. Senate seat in Montana. Consequently, Sam Davis, the existing Chief of Staff, has been appointed as the interim CEO while Jeffrey Kelter assumes the role of Executive Chairman.

news.headline: Maritime Partners acquires e1 Marine, expanding into hydrogen-powered maritime solutions. Acquisition completed on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: Maritime Partners, LLC ("Maritime Partners"), a prominent provider of maritime financing solutions specializing in Jones Act vessels, has recently finalized the acquisition of e1 Marine. This acquisition, completed on July 1, 2024, marks a significant step towards expanding opportunities for cleaner fuel in the maritime industry. With this new development, Maritime Partners is poised to explore sustainable fuel options to enhance environmental practices within the sector. This strategic move underscores the company's commitment to promoting eco-friendly initiatives and underscores its position as a key player in the maritime financing sector.

news.headline: Maglite and PSI team up to promote safety during National Roadside Traffic Safety Awareness Month as pedestrian deaths continue to rise. 2023 on track to set new record (GHSA).
news.summary: The number of pedestrian fatalities has been consistently rising at an alarming rate year after year. In 2023, the trend is expected to continue with the year on pace to break a new record, as reported by the Governors Highway Safety Association (GHSA). In a recent initiative to address this issue, the renowned Maglite brand has collaborated with the Pedestrian Safety Institute (PSI) to promote and enhance traffic safety measures, particularly focusing on pedestrian safety. The partnership comes at a critical time as the statistics highlight the severity of the situation, emphasizing the urgent need for comprehensive strategies to improve road safety.

news.headline: Skye Bioscience (Nasdaq: SKYE) added to Russell 2000® and Russell 3000® Indexes on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Skye Bioscience, Inc. (Nasdaq: SKYE), a clinical-stage biotechnology company specializing in developing therapeutic drugs targeting the endocannabinoid system, disclosed its addition to the Russell 2000® Index and Russell 3000® Index. This move took effect with the opening of the U.S. market on the aforementioned date as part of the annual reconstitution of the Russell stock indexes. This development marks a significant milestone for Skye as it positions the company for increased visibility and potential investment opportunities within the market.

news.headline: Applied Therapeutics (Nasdaq: APLT) added to Russell 3000 Index on June 28, 2024, during annual reconstitution.
news.summary: In New York on July 01, 2024, Applied Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: APLT), a biopharmaceutical company in the clinical stage and focusing on developing novel drug candidates for validated molecular targets in areas with significant unmet medical needs, shared its inclusion in the Russell 3000® Index. This update became effective post the closing of the U.S. market on June 28, 2024, marking its addition as part of the 2024 annual reconstitution of the Russell indexes.
